name: risk-scores-panel
title: Risk Scores Panel
description: A row of clinical risk gauges as a panel, with an extras slot for a FallRiskIndicator or similar. Composes WidgetPanel + RiskScoreGauge.

props.name: extras
props.description: Extra content after the gauges, e.g. a FallRiskIndicator.

clinicalNotes: Grouping a patient's risk scores in one panel supports the shift-handover and rounding view where relative risk drives prioritization. Each gauge must keep its own scale disclosure (via RiskScoreGauge's `scale` tooltip) — risk numbers from different instruments are not comparable, so never let the shared layout imply a common axis. The extras slot keeps specialized, non-gauge indicators (fall risk, pressure-injury) alongside without forcing them into the gauge shape.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart and Triage blocks.
